title: VISTA Style Spec
description: The A<->B integration contract. Engineer B generates one locked spec per profile; Engineer A injects it VERBATIM into every room's restyle prompt. Frozen at H4, never changed after H8.

profile_id.description: Matches the seeded mem0 profile id; used in asset filenames.

palette_hex.description: Inject every hex into every prompt — this is what enforces cross-room palette consistency.

hard_constraints.description: Architecture-preservation rules. Always include preserve windows/doors/geometry + no people.
